variables.subline: You're all set. Let's turn that first idea into something real.

visuals.svg: <svg width='1080' height='1920' viewBox='0 0 1080 1920' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><defs><linearGradient id='bg' x1='0' y1='0' x2='0.6' y2='1'><stop offset='0' stop-color='#12324A'/><stop offset='0.5' stop-color='#0C1A2A'/><stop offset='1' stop-color='#081019'/></linearGradient><radialGradient id='g1' cx='0.2' cy='0.16' r='0.7'><stop offset='0' stop-color='{{accent2}}' stop-opacity='0.42'/><stop offset='1' stop-color='{{accent2}}' stop-opacity='0'/></radialGradient><radialGradient id='g2' cx='0.9' cy='0.86' r='0.7'><stop offset='0' stop-color='{{accent}}' stop-opacity='0.26'/><stop offset='1' stop-color='{{accent}}' stop-opacity='0'/></radialGradient></defs><rect width='1080' height='1920' fill='url(#bg)'/><rect width='1080' height='1920' fill='url(#g1)'/><rect width='1080' height='1920' fill='url(#g2)'/><rect x='40' y='40' width='1000' height='1840' rx='46' fill='none' stroke='#FFFFFF' stroke-opacity='0.08' stroke-width='1.5'/></svg>
